caption: A woman wearing a long-sleeved black dress and white heels lies on her back with one hand resting on her stomach in a vast, undulating green moss-covered landscape under an overcast sky. The scene transforms into a fluffy, greyish-brown fox with a long bushy tail stands on a vast, undulating landscape covered in thick green moss under a cloudy sky.
A young man in a bucket hat and red t-shirt stands in front of a corner coffee house. The scene transforms into a red fox trotting away down the same sidewalk.

A young man with a mustache, wearing a plaid cap, a beige long-sleeved polo shirt, and a dark teal sweater draped over his shoulders, stands in a grassy field under a blue sky with light clouds. The scene transforms into a giant panda stands on all fours in a grassy field with scattered white flowers, with a line of green trees and a cloudy blue sky in the background under bright daylight.

A young woman with straight blonde hair and bangs wears dark cat-eye sunglasses and a blue, white, and black Yamaha motorcycle jacket over a black crop top, standing in front of a poster-covered wall in bright sunlight. The scene transforms into a tiger with orange and black stripes stands on an asphalt street in front of urban buildings.

A smiling young woman with dark hair and a black off-the-shoulder top rests her head on a green pillow against a plain, warm-toned wall under soft lighting. The scene transforms into a blurry, light-colored cat is positioned on a rumpled brown blanket in front of a plain beige wall and a curtain.

A young woman with dark hair sits on a grey floor against a solid red backdrop, wearing a dark grey oversized coat, a red plaid skirt, white socks, and white sneakers, with a white handbag and a branch of green leaves and red berries resting beside her. The scene transforms into a tiger with orange and black stripes stands on a grey floor against a solid red background.
